message.content: The page has a light blue background. At the top left, the word "Logo" is displayed in a light blue color (hex code approximate: #a8d0e6), using a sans-serif font with a medium weight. Below this, centered horizontally, is the logo design. The logo consists of two main elements: on the left, Arabic text "وسال" in a teal color (hex code approximate: #5a9ea6) with a modern, slightly bold sans-serif typeface; directly beneath the Arabic text is the English word "wesal" in the same teal color, using a lighter, regular-weight sans-serif font. To the right of the Arabic text is a heart-shaped icon in the same light blue color as the "Logo" text, featuring two interlocking circular loops inside the heart, creating a symmetrical design. The overall layout is clean and minimal, with ample negative space around the logo elements.
